evidence_snippets: Margaret turns -- and suddenly grins. Running up is DEE-ANN, 30, a Beat girl in a black leotard and sandals. Dee-Ann excitedly grabs her, and they laugh and hug girlishly.
And that one started as me, but then Mother turned it into a Chinese boy. Huh? Walter peers at Jane... then at Margaret. And then --
Margaret stares, puzzled. The women come closer. They are Asian, dressed in formal dresses. Curious, Margaret creeps over, spying on them...
